# Data Level Enum
| Level | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Day | Displays data at a 5-minute granularity within one day. |
| Week | Present the data of the week in which the target date falls. |
| Month | Presents daily data for an entire month. |
| Year | Shows monthly data across a whole year. |
| Lifetime | Illustrates annual data throughout the system's or product's lifetime. |
